form_name: Notice of Buyer's Termination of Contract

property_address.notes: Above '(Street Address and City)' label at y=128

seller_name.notes: Long blank wraps y=153->y=172 ending at (SELLER) at x=507

buyer_name.notes: Buyer signature line 1 (left) — 'Buyer' label at y=663 below

buyer_name_2.notes: Buyer signature line 2 (right) — second buyer if joint

contract_effective_date.notes: Date line under signature 1 — 'Date' label at (270.9, 663.2)

termination_notice_date.notes: Date line under signature 2 — 'Date' label at (526.5, 663.2)

termination_checkbox_option_period.label: (1) Option Period unrestricted
termination_checkbox_option_period.note: X-overlay position approximate; agent ticks visually at signing

termination_checkbox_financing.label: (2) Financing (Buyer Approval)
termination_checkbox_financing.note: X-overlay position approximate; agent ticks visually at signing

termination_checkbox_property.label: (3) Property Approval
termination_checkbox_property.note: X-overlay position approximate; agent ticks visually at signing

termination_checkbox_hoa.label: (4) HOA mandatory membership
termination_checkbox_hoa.note: X-overlay position approximate; agent ticks visually at signing

termination_checkbox_disclosure.label: (5) Seller's Disclosure 7B(2)
termination_checkbox_disclosure.note: X-overlay position approximate; agent ticks visually at signing

termination_checkbox_appraisal.label: (6) Lender's Appraisal Para 3
termination_checkbox_appraisal.note: X-overlay position approximate; agent ticks visually at signing

termination_checkbox_objections.label: (7) Para 6.D objections not cured
termination_checkbox_objections.note: X-overlay position approximate; agent ticks visually at signing

termination_checkbox_other.label: (8) Other
termination_checkbox_other.note: X-overlay position approximate; agent ticks visually at signing

termination_reason_other.notes: Free-text reason if (8) Other checked — 6 blank lines

_atlas_audit.note: y values converted from TOP-of-page (original JSON) to PDF bottom-left baseline (pdf-lib convention) via pdf_y = 792 - top_y. Page height = 792 (US Letter portrait).
